svg.text: - No API contract or schema changes
✗ no performance test ✗ no load test
- Grafana screenshot: readinglist never exceeds 80 MiB
- Native image uses less memory, 96 MiB seems safe
- Cluster at 70% memory, need to free capacity
Hidden: Measured at Idle, Not Under Load
readinglist: 90m CPU + 96Mi memory = starvation under load
OOMKilled restarts + CPU throttling → cascading failures
